creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #2)
Hi Rainer,

Thank you for looking into this!  I am sorry I didn't wait long enough as right before getting your response, I locked all my pkgs and then unlocked texlive-tlmgr and updated it via pkg.

In any case performing  # pkg info devel/tex-kpathsea

returns

tex-kpathsea-6.3.5
Name           : tex-kpathsea
Version        : 6.3.5
Installed on   : Tue May 16 04:19:37 2023 CEST
Origin         : devel/tex-kpathsea
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : devel
Licenses       : LGPL21+
Maintainer     : tex@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : UNKNOWN
Comment        : Path searching library for TeX
Shared Libs provided:
        libkpathsea.so.6
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1301000


There seems also to be a few related ports in the portmaster queued to receive updates which may be of interest

Install print/tex-formats
Upgrade texlive-base-20230313_3 to texlive-base-20230313_4
Install print/texlive-texmf
